title: prunus × donarium var. compta
intro: Prunus × donarium var. compta, also known as Prunus × incana or Japanese plum, is a deciduous tree or shrub that belongs to the Prunus genus and is a hybrid of Prunus avium and Prunus mume. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Prunus × donarium var. compta include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and supporting immune system function. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
